name: New master of deceit!
description:
"KYAHAHAHA! I'm the new master of deceit! Black sapphire cookie, can you imagine??"

We are so doomed... "

As Shadow Milk cookie get inside Pure Vanilla cookie the Spire of deceit collapsed, but the domain can't die so easily, and it choose Candy Apple as new master.

Now instead big ahh blue spire there small red tower, but that's just for now... Soon candy apple cookie will become stronger and blah blah blah blah blah blah

Black Sapphire is now her minion, but they still fighting like siblings. And now he's wearing big ahh red bow cuz Candy Apple want him to look ridiculous.

December update: added information about black sapphire cookie. Uhhh uhhh googoogaga
